Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('C:\\\\Users\\\\klars\\\\OneDrive - FutureDial Inc\\\\Desktop\\\\CollectImages.xlsx'\); const sheet = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(sheet, { header: 1, raw: false, defval: '' }\); console.log\('Sheet:', wb.SheetNames[0]\); console.log\('Total rows:', rows.length\); console.log\('Columns in row 0:', rows[0]?.length\); console.log\(\); console.log\('First 5 rows:'\); rows.slice\(0, 5\).forEach\(\(r, i\) => console.log\('Row', i, ':', JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\); console.log\(\); console.log\('Last 2 rows:'\); rows.slice\(-2\).forEach\(\(r, i\) => console.log\('Row', rows.length - 2 + i, ':', JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\);")
